ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the movie */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Plot overview of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes the movie has received */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average vote score of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "budget_adj" REAL /* Adjusted budget to account for inflation */,
  "revenue_adj" REAL /* Adjusted revenue to account for inflation */,
  "budget_levels" TEXT /* Level of the budget (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Short tagline or catchphrase for the movie */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Official rating of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's trailer */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Current status of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie the actor stars in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie the director directed */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "budget_level" TEXT /* Level of the budget */,
  "adjusted_budget" REAL /* Adjusted budget to account for inflation */,
  "adjusted_revenue" REAL /* Adjusted revenue to account for inflation */,
  "profit" REAL /* Calculated profit from the movie */,
  "return_on_investment" REAL /* Return on investment (ROI) for the movie */,
  "production_expenses" REAL /* Total production expenses */,
  "marketing_expenses" REAL /* Total marketing expenses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes the movie has received */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average vote score of the movie */,
  "rating_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ratings */,
  "critical_acclaim" INTEGER /* Indicates if the movie received critical acclaim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production detail */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company responsible for the movie */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the movie was produced */,
  "language" TEXT /* Original language of the movie */,
  "production_budget" REAL /* Detailed production budget */,
  "marketing_budget" REAL /* Detailed marketing budget */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when production started */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when production ended */,
  "distributor" TEXT /* Distributor of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_details_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., producer, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)
